testsuite.name: TestRunner.Runner
testsuite.system-out: Execution started for : Receiving Case : Single Line, Single iLPN Execution started for : Receiving Case : Single Line, Multiple iLPN Execution started for : Multi Line Receiving- Multi Line, Multiple iLPN Execution started for : B-459309 Receive Damages- Receiving Damaged Product using MM3 Recv-Damages & Putaway Execution started for : B-467729 – Configure Manhattan for RF lock-unlock iLPN-- Lock an iLPN using the user provided lock code Execution started for : B-467729 – Configure Manhattan for RF lock-unlock iLPN-- Unlock an iLPN which already has some lock Execution started for : B-474831 FXL-FFD-CIL-MH_Inventory Control-Base Transactions# 4- Consume iLPN having no lock Execution started for : B-474831 FXL-FFD-CIL-MH_Inventory Control-Base Transactions# 4- Consume iLPN having lock code Execution started for : Heavy Items Putaway Execution started for : Receiving ASN & completing oversized Putaway Execution started for : Normal Items Putaway
